recommendations.title: The White Tiger
recommendations.overview: An ambitious Indian driver uses his wit and cunning to escape from poverty and rise to the top. An epic journey based on the New York Times bestseller.

recommendations.title: Fahrenheit 451
recommendations.overview: In an oppressive future, a 'fireman' whose duty is to destroy all books begins to question his task.

recommendations.title: At Any Price

recommendations.title: On the Fringe

recommendations.title: Nosferatu
recommendations.overview: The mysterious Count Orlok summons a happily married real estate agent to his castle, located up in the Transylvanian mountains, to finalise a terrifying deal.

recommendations.title: Tom and Jerry: The Fast and the Furry
recommendations.overview: After being evicted from their old house by Tom's owner for causing major damage, cat and mouse Tom and Jerry enter a race entitled the "Fabulous Super Race" to win a mansion.

recommendations.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit

recommendations.title: The Descendants
recommendations.overview: With his wife Elizabeth on life support after a boating accident, Hawaiian land baron Matt King takes his daughters on a trip from Oahu to Kauai to confront a young real estate broker, who was having an affair with Elizabeth before her misfortune.

recommendations.title: CJ7
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Drama, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A poor construction worker, who struggles to keep his son in private school, mistakes an orb he finds in a junkjard for a toy which proves to be much, much more once the young boy starts to play with it.
